context: inability to visualize urine in fetal bladder (after 13 weeks) ← bladder agenesis / | flattened discoid shape of adrenals ← absence of pressure by kidney | bell-shaped thorax in mid to late 3rd trimester ← pulmonary hypoplasia | compression deformities of extremities → clubfoot, flexion contractures, joint dislocations
